# Project Setup Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - PHP website with modern aesthetic, white/light blue colors, smooth animations
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Creating PHP structure
- [x] Customize the Project - Created modern storefront and admin panel
- [x] Install Required Extensions - Not needed
- [x] Compile the Project - No compilation needed for PHP
- [x] Create and Run Task - Not needed, using PHP built-in server
- [x] Launch the Project - Running on http://localhost:8080
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md created with full documentation
